message:
refactor(tests): Continue test suite quality improvements

Additional test file updates following the same patterns:

- cancel_attribution.rs: Simplify assertion logic
- lab_determinism.rs: Remove unused import
- lab_execution.rs: Add explicit type annotation
- net_unix.rs: Add module constant for reuse
- property_region_ops.rs: Simplify region creation patterns
- repro_epoch_barrier_race.rs: Use u32 type for barrier count
- sync_e2e.rs: Formatting consistency
- time_e2e.rs: Restructure timeout test assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
